{{- $page := .page -}} {{- with .entry -}} {{- $href := "" -}} {{- if and .PageRef .URL -}} {{- errorf "menu-button: entry %q has both PageRef and URL set. Define only one." .Identifier -}} {{- else if .PageRef -}} {{- $href = $page.RelPermalink -}} {{- else if .URL -}} {{- $href = .URL -}} {{- else -}} {{- errorf "menu-button: entry %q has neither PageRef nor URL set." .Identifier -}} {{- end -}} {{- $class := "menu-button" -}} {{- $ariaCurrent := "" -}} {{- if $page.IsMenuCurrent .Menu . -}} {{- $class = "menu-button menu-button--active" -}} {{- $ariaCurrent = "page" -}} {{- else if $page.HasMenuCurrent .Menu . -}} {{- $class = "menu-button menu-button--ancestor" -}} {{- $ariaCurrent = "true" -}} {{- end -}} {{- $name := .Name -}} {{- with .Identifier -}} {{- with T . -}} {{- $name = . -}} {{- end -}} {{- end -}} {{ $name }} {{- end -}}
